name: Gogo Inc.
summary: Company Overview Gogo Inc. (Gogo, the Company, we or us) is the only multi-orbit, multi-band in-flight connectivity provider offering connectivity technology purpose-built for business and military/government aviation. We have a holistic approach of providing broadband connectivity services to our customers from small to large aircraft and heavy jets through our air-to-ground (ATG) technology and integrated low earth orbit (LEO) and geostationary earth orbit (GEO) satellite solutions provided by...
